title: Added GPU versions of volume and face reference kernels.

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `UnicodePlots` package from `1` to `1, 2`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for UnicodePlots to 2, (keep existing compat)
